channel.title: Cryptography & Data Integrity on SOPHY'S CYBERLAB
channel.description: Recent content in Cryptography & Data Integrity on SOPHY'S CYBERLAB

item.title: Cryptographic Wallet Engineering & BIP39 Implementation
item.description: Objective: To demonstrate the technical process of generating cryptographic identities and managing multi-coin wallet backups using mnemonic phrases.

item.title: Blockchain Forensics & Incident Post-Mortem (Bitfinex Case Study)
item.description: Objective: To analyze high-scale cryptocurrency heists and identify the critical security failures in private key management that lead to multi-billion dollar losses.

item.title: Mandatory Access Control (MAC) using SELinux
item.description: Objective: To enforce strict security policies at the kernel level, preventing unauthorized resource access by compromised services.

item.title: Data Integrity Verification via Cryptographic Hashing
item.description: Objective: To utilize one-way hashing algorithms to verify data authenticity and secure credential storage.

item.title: Cryptographic Infrastructure & Secure Communication
item.description: Objective: To implement and manage cryptographic systems that ensure end-to-end data confidentiality and authenticated communication.

item.title: Offline Cryptanalysis & Password Recovery
item.description: Objective: To utilize high-performance cracking tools to perform a dictionary attack against stolen MD5 hashes, successfully recovering plaintext credentials.
